Alma I know is unpredictable, but an eventually escalating in Europe that in fact is happening, would not decrease the probability of the market to bottom in? This will fracture all the balance around the world and china……. We know the story.

Soo, who’s gonna buy this if these things doesn’t concretise, and why they should buy uncertainty. (we’re going at the opposite way).
